wins: Record net inflows of $641 billion in 2024
Double-digit growth in annual revenue, operating income, and earnings per share
7% annualized organic base fee growth in Q4, highest in 3 years
Successful integration of GIP and planned acquisitions of HPS and Preqin
Strong demand for Aladdin technology and whole portfolio solutions
risks: Nonoperating results included $7 million of net investment losses
Higher share count in the current quarter
Potential changes in tax legislation affecting effective tax rate
Market and regulatory uncertainties for planned acquisitions
Uncertainty around the impact of macroeconomic factors on fixed income flows
